lyrics.text: They say, "Oh my God, I see the way you shine
lyrics.translation: 他们说:“天哪你浑身散发着光芒

lyrics.text: Take your hands, my dear, and place them both in mine"
lyrics.translation: 牵起你的手亲爱的 握住别松开”

lyrics.text: You know you stopped me dead while I was passing by
lyrics.translation: 你知道我们擦肩而过时 我的心跳都停止了

lyrics.text: And now I beg to see you dance just one more time
lyrics.translation: 现在我想恳求你再跳一遍刚才的舞

lyrics.text: Ooh, I see you, see you, see you every time
lyrics.translation: 你的每次出现我都移不开视线

lyrics.text: And oh my, I, I,I,I like your style
lyrics.translation: 天哪我就欣赏你的表演风格

lyrics.text: You, you make me, make me, make me wanna cry
lyrics.translation: 你让我开心激动喜悦到流泪

lyrics.text: And now I beg to see you dance just one more time
lyrics.translation: 现在我恳求你为我再跳一支舞

lyrics.text: So they say
lyrics.translation: 所以他们说

lyrics.text: Dance for me, dance for me, dance for me, oh-oh-oh
lyrics.translation: 跳起来吧 跳起来吧 为我跳舞吧

lyrics.text: I’ve never seen anybody do the things you do before
lyrics.translation: 我从没见过有人做过你做的事

lyrics.text: They say
lyrics.translation: 他们说

lyrics.text: Move for me, move for me, move for me, ayy-ayy-ayy
lyrics.translation: 动起来吧 动起来吧 为我摇摆吧

lyrics.text: And when you’re done, I'll make you do it all again
lyrics.translation: 等这支舞结束我会恳求你再跳一支

lyrics.text: I said, "Oh my God, I see you walking by
lyrics.translation: 我说:“天哪我看见你经过我身旁

lyrics.text: Take my hands, my dear, and look me in my eyes"
lyrics.translation: 握住我的手亲爱的 认真注视我的眼睛”

lyrics.text: Just like a monkey, I've been dancin’ my whole life
lyrics.translation: 我就像被戏耍的猴子一样以卖艺为生

lyrics.text: But you just beg to see me dance just one more time
lyrics.translation: 现在你恳求我为你再跳一支

lyrics.text: Ooh, I see you, see you, see you every time
lyrics.translation: 你的每次出现我都移不开视线

lyrics.text: And oh my, I, I，I，I like your style
lyrics.translation: 天哪我就欣赏你的表演风格

lyrics.text: You, you make me, make me, make me wanna cry
lyrics.translation: 你让我开心激动喜悦到流泪

lyrics.text: And now I beg to see you dance just one more time
lyrics.translation: 现在我恳求你为我再跳一支

lyrics.translation: 我从未见过如此独特的舞步
